greeting: Hi! 👋 Ask me about our hours, pricing, services, or anything else.
persona: You are a friendly, concise support assistant for a small business website chat widget. Answer clearly in 1-3 sentences unless more detail is truly needed.

faq.answer: We're open Monday to Friday, 9am to 6pm, and Saturday 10am to 4pm. We're closed on Sundays and public holidays.
Our pricing depends on the service you need. Most packages start at $49 and scale up based on scope — happy to give you an exact quote if you tell me more about what you're looking for.
We offer consulting, custom setup, and ongoing support packages. Let me know what you're trying to accomplish and I can point you to the right service.
You can reach us at hello@example.com or (555) 123-4567. Our team typically responds within one business day.
We're based at 123 Main Street, Suite 200, in your city — and we also work with clients remotely worldwide.
You can book a time with us through the 'Schedule a Call' link on our site, or just tell me a few times that work for you and I'll help coordinate.
We offer a 14-day money-back guarantee on all new packages. To cancel or request a refund, just reach out to hello@example.com with your order details.
We accept all major credit cards, PayPal, and bank transfer for larger packages. Invoices are sent by email and can be paid online.
Of course — I can connect you with a team member. Please share your name and email, and someone from our team will follow up shortly.
